entries.definition:
j–b–w/y pools; basins, cauldrons, to collect water in a basin, collected drinking water; to request; to select; to invent; to kneel down. Of this root, three forms occur 12 times in the Qurʾan: يُجْبَى yujbā once; اجْتَبَى ʾijtabā 10 times and جَوَاب jawāb (variant reading جَوَابِي jawābī) once.
يُجْبَى yujbā [imperf. of pass. v. جُبِيَ jubiya] to be collected as dues or taxes; (of water) to be collected for future use (28:57) أَوَلَمْ نُمَكِّن لَّهُمْ حَرَمًا آمِنًا يُجْبَىٰ إِلَيْهِ ثَمَرَاتُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ have We not established for them a secure sanctuary to which every kind of produce is brought as dues?!

اِجْتَبَى ʾijtabā [v. VIII, trans.] 1 to select, to choose, to single out (22:78) وَجَاهِدُوا فِي اللَّهِ حَقَّ جِهَادِهِ هُوَ اجْتَبَاكُمْ and strive for God as striving for Him is due: He has chosen you 2 to request, to ask for

155

j–b–w/y pools; basins, cauldrons, to collect water in a basin, collected drinking water; to request; to select; to invent; to kneel down. Of this root, three forms occur 12 times in the Qurʾan: يُجْبَى yujbā once; اجْتَبَى ʾijtabā 10 times and جَوَاب jawāb (variant reading جَوَابِي jawābī) once.
يُجْبَى yujbā [imperf. of pass. v. جُبِيَ jubiya] to be collected as dues or taxes; (of water) to be collected for future use (28:57) أَوَلَمْ نُمَكِّن لَّهُمْ حَرَمًا آمِنًا يُجْبَىٰ إِلَيْهِ ثَمَرَاتُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ have We not established for them a secure sanctuary to which every kind of produce is brought as dues?!

اِجْتَبَى ʾijtabā [v. VIII, trans.] 1 to select, to choose, to single out (22:78) وَجَاهِدُوا فِي اللَّهِ حَقَّ جِهَادِهِ هُوَ اجْتَبَاكُمْ and strive for God as striving for Him is due: He has chosen you 2 to request, to ask for

155

entries.definition:
(7:203) وَإِذَا لَمْ تَأْتِهِم بِآيَةٍ قَالُوا لَوْلَا اجْتَبَيْتَهَا when you do not bring them a [fresh] revelation, they say, ‘But can’t you just ask for one?’ 3 to invent, to fabricate, to do by oneself (in another interpretation of 7:203) وَإِذَا لَمْ تَأْتِهِم بِآيَةٍ قَالُوا لَوْلَا اجْتَبَيْتَهَا when you do not bring them a [fresh] revelation, they say, ‘Why can’t you just make it up?’
جَوَاب jawāb (variant reading only in non-pausal recitation جَوَابِي jawābi with a shortened final long vowel ī) [pl. of n. جَابِيَة jābiyatun] large pools, large watering-troughs (34:13) يَعْمَلُونَ لَهُ مَا يَشَاءُ مِن مَّحَارِيبَ وَتَمَاثِيلَ وَجِفَانٍ كَالْجَوَابِ they made him whatever he wanted–palaces, statues and bowls as large as watering troughs.
